underlying_goal: Fix bugs in TC Agent's generated IX React apps, improve error handling for code generation failures, and generate comprehensive Founder Guide documentation for the tc-agent project
friction_detail: Claude initially tried clicking wrong UI buttons multiple times, and misunderstood the HTML generation failure as a code issue when user said it was just internet.
brief_summary: User needed IX React app bugs fixed, better error messages for code generation, and Founder Guide docs generated — all were completed successfully.
